summary: ITERATION 3 FEATURES FULLY FUNCTIONAL - Reminder interval customization on task edit screen and improved Whisper voice pipeline working correctly. All backend APIs tested (13/13 passed). All frontend features verified via Playwright. Integration between frontend and backend confirmed.

react_native_issues.issue: Nested TouchableOpacity components render as nested <button> elements in web, causing HTML validation warning
react_native_issues.details: Same issue from iteration 1 and 2. Parent TouchableOpacity (card) contains child TouchableOpacity (check button and delete button). Causes console warnings but functionality works.
react_native_issues.impact: Non-breaking. Causes console warnings but does not affect functionality.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated shadow* style props used instead of boxShadow
react_native_issues.details: React Native Web shows warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'.
react_native_issues.impact: Non-breaking deprecation warning. Will need migration in future SDK versions.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All 7 reminder interval options work correctly (15min, 30min, 60min, 120min, 240min, 480min, 1440min)
✓ Backend: POST /api/reminders/configure accepts task_id and interval_minutes
✓ Backend: Reminder re-enable after disable works correctly
✓ Frontend: Persistent Reminders section visible with Bell icon on task edit screen
✓ Frontend: Reminder toggle ON/OFF button works (testID='reminder-toggle')
✓ Frontend: All 7 interval selector chips present (testID='interval-15', 'interval-30', etc.)
✓ Frontend: Interval selector is horizontally scrollable to show all options
✓ Frontend: Priority auto-adjust implemented (urgent=30min, high=120min, medium=240min, low=480min)
✓ Frontend: Status change to completed triggers reminder cancellation
✓ Frontend: VoiceRecorder shows 'Voice is transcribed by AI (Whisper)' text
✓ Frontend: Task creation via text input still works end-to-end
✓ Integration: Frontend → Backend reminder configuration verified
✓ Integration: Completed tasks excluded from pending reminders
⚠ Frontend: Nested TouchableOpacity warning persists (same as iteration 1 & 2, non-breaking)
⚠ Frontend: Deprecated shadow* props warning persists (same as iteration 1 & 2, non-breaking)
seed_data_creation: Test task created: 'TEST_Iteration3: Review quarterly reports' with reminder configuration. Task status changed to completed during testing. All test data cleaned up via pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features (reminder interval customization + improved Whisper pipeline) fully tested and working. Backend endpoints all functional. Frontend UI shows all 7 interval options, toggle works, Save Reminder button works, priority auto-adjust works. Integration verified. Previous iteration issues (nested buttons, deprecated shadow props) still present but non-breaking. No new bugs found.

test_categories.persistent_reminders_section: Section visible with Bell icon and description

Priority auto-adjust: urgent=30min, high=120min, medium=240min, low=480min
